name: CDIF Instance Variable
abstract: Profile of cdi:InstanceVariable / schema:PropertyValue used as a member of a schema:variableMeasured array. Adds DDI-CDI properties (cdif:physicalDataType, cdif:role, cdif:simpleUnitOfMeasure, cdif:uses, cdi:qualifies) on top of schemaorgProperties/variableMeasured and ddiCDIFProperties/ddi-cdif-instance-variable. Accepts a single node, an unwrapped @graph array of nodes (OGC pipeline), or a JSON-LD document with @context and @graph.
